description: Test cases for the product-audit skill. Each test case is a realistic user prompt that should trigger the skill. Outputs are evaluated qualitatively (report quality, structure adherence) and quantitatively (structure presence, screenshot count, finding count, §6 completeness).

evals.name: saas-express-default
evals.prompt: 帮我用 express 档位快速测评 https://linear.app，给我一份简短报告
expected_behavior: Report contains §0 Executive Summary, §3 体验流程记录, §4 问题清单, §6 横向对标, §7 总结
§6 横向对标 should be present (auto-suggested competitors like Asana / Jira)

evals.name: multi-agent-standard-with-competitors
evals.prompt: 评测一个多 Agent 产品 https://lindy.ai，标准深度，竞品对比 manus.im 和 coze.cn，中文报告
expected_behavior: §6 横向对标 includes specifically manus.im AND coze.cn (no auto-suggest)

evals.name: ai-tool-deep-with-benchmark
evals.prompt: 深度评测 https://perplexity.ai，AI 工具模板，跑标准基准 prompt 看产出质量
expected_behavior: Executes test point A4 (run sample task) with the default benchmark prompt
Captures task execution progression (multiple sequential screenshots)
Report evaluates: citation quality (real vs fake), artifact format, completion UX
§6 横向对标 auto-suggests AI tool competitors (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude.ai, Genspark)
